Metadata.title: Antiblaze | Scroll snap test
Metadata.description: Scroll-snap prototype with a fixed navbar, section tracking and full-screen vertical sections.

section1.title: The new generation of protection for roofing systems.
section1.description: The evolution from <brand>Duralfoil®</brand> becomes a clearer, more current proposition that can communicate technical value from the first screen.
section1.credibilityLine: Proven in demanding industrial and commercial environments

section2.title: Efficient Thermal Control for Industrial Roof Systems
section2.problemLine1: Roof systems absorb solar heat and push it indoors.
section2.problemLine2: That raises interior temperatures and affects people, operations and energy costs.
section2.problem: Roof systems absorb solar heat and transfer it indoors. That raises temperature and affects operations, people and energy costs.

installation.label: Installed under
installation.value: Metal, fiber cement, concrete and other roof types

section2.product: Antiblaze® is a reflective insulation installed beneath the roof that blocks radiant heat before it enters the space.
section2.howItWorks: It limits radiant heat before it enters the space, while also supporting moisture, vapor and acoustic control.

benefit1.title: Lower interior heat load
benefit1.description: Reduces heat transfer from the roof and helps maintain a more stable indoor temperature.

benefit2.title: Cooling savings
benefit2.description: Reduces demand on air conditioning and ventilation, helping lower operating energy costs.

benefit3.title: Moisture and condensation control
benefit3.description: Helps limit condensation points under the roof and improves system behavior in demanding environments.

benefit4.title: Better operational continuity
benefit4.description: Supports more controlled conditions for people, equipment, inventory and heat-sensitive processes.

section2.support: Antiblaze® combines thermal performance, fire resistance and durability in one practical under-roof solution.
section2.ctaSupport: ASSESS THE THERMAL IMPACT ON YOUR PROJECT
section2.ctaMicrocopy: Quick guidance for the right system and application.
section2.comparisonHelper: Drag to compare a roof without the installation and a roof with Antiblaze®.
section2.comparisonKeyboardHint: Use the left and right arrow keys to move the comparison.
section2.comparisonBeforeAlt: Roof without reflective installation showing higher solar heat transfer into the interior.
section2.comparisonAfterAlt: Roof with Antiblaze® installed showing lower radiant heat transfer into the interior.

technical1.title: Lower thermal transfer
technical1.description: Reduces the passage of heat from the roof into the interior.

technical2.title: More efficient and sustainable solution
technical2.description: Contributes to lower energy consumption and a more responsible operation.

technical3.title: Lightweight, safe and durable
technical3.description: Installs beneath the roof without adding significant load and maintains long-term performance.

section3.title: Current Product
section3.description: Third full-screen snap target inside the same scroll container.

section4.title: Send us a message
section4.description: Tell us about your project and we will help you define the right solution for your roof system.
section4.submitHelper: Submitting opens your email client with the message ready to send.
section4.contactInfoTitle: Direct channels for support and sales
section4.contactInfoDescription: Duracol is the exclusive importer and representative for Colombia. You can also reach us by WhatsApp or email for support, sales and quotations.
section4.responseText: Share the main details of your project and we will respond through the most appropriate channel.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project, roof type or current need.

exclusiveRep.value: Exclusive Importer and Representative for Colombia
